indicators.description: Identifies that the two features have incompatible assumptions about restart frequency
Explains the specific problem: rate limiter assumes rare restarts, --replace enables frequent ones
Suggests addressing the interaction before closing both agents
Does not treat the two completions as unrelated successes
Identifies that three independent fixes all involve timing or synchronization around the daemon
Hypothesizes that daemon performance under load is the root issue these fixes mask
Suggests investigating daemon performance rather than just closing the three fixes
Does not treat the three completions as unrelated successes
Identifies that the two features have incompatible assumptions about restart frequency
indicators.detection: response contains restart|assumption|tension|incompatible|conflict|resets|frequent|rare

indicators.description: Identifies that three independent fixes all involve timing or synchronization around the daemon
